goal: Implement and locally verify only the T0702 protected GitHub Actions entrypoint for one owner-dispatched, main-bound, same-tree-Alpha-gated Raw-only Beta run. The entrypoint must accept exactly six Beta Secret values, archive and remotely recover at least one and at most the explicit positive budget of deterministically verified messages, emit aggregate-only evidence, perform zero Gmail mutation, and contain no Parser, M3, Processed or Timeline authority.
scope: T0702 and S7AC-002 only; no T0703 or later release phase
read-only verification of the MetaDatabase repository identity, visibility, current main identity, Environment names, Secret names and GitHub App observability
exact control repository, owner, actor, main ref, workflow ref, run, attempt and expected commit binding before any Secret read
manual workflow_dispatch with owner confirmation and protected moomooau-beta Environment
same-tree Local Synthetic Alpha authority hash and completed-Beta aggregate release gate
exact six-name Beta Secret allowlist with no implicit Secret enumeration
one single-use Raw-only runtime with positive explicit budget, deterministic sender registry, capacity freshness, GitHub App/private repository identity and age identity binding
full RAW fetch only after metadata verification, append-only age ciphertext commit and remote recovery
aggregate-only successful evidence with Gmail, Processed, M3 and Timeline effects fixed to zero
local task oracle, type, workflow-policy, package, status, publication and Stage 7 preflight validation
truthful protected Beta Oracle NOT_RUN and LOCAL_ONLY_NOT_PUBLISHED state
non_goals: creating, configuring or approving the moomooau-beta GitHub Environment
creating or writing the sole private data repository or installing/configuring a GitHub App
reading or provisioning Gmail OAuth, sender-registry content, age identity, opaque key, private key or Beta config values
discovering, reading, downloading, archiving, recovering or mutating any real Gmail message
executing or dispatching the protected Beta workflow
running Parser, M3, Processed, Timeline, Release Asset, Gmail Trash, 04:30 schedule, GA, Recovery Drill or Patch Lifecycle
claiming T0702, S7AC-002, any linked final Acceptance, production health, Stage 7 or RMD-06 complete
performing the final whole-package review or review remediation in this run
protected_oracles: owner-approved moomooau-beta GitHub Environment with required reviewers and branch policy
six exact protected Beta Secret values provisioned only to that Environment
explicit positive Beta message budget and fresh capacity evidence
active sender registry whose candidates have been independently verified
single private data repository numeric identity and installed least-privilege GitHub App numeric identity
age identity bound to the configured recipient and held only in verified runner tmpfs
one main-bound owner workflow_dispatch on the exact expected commit after the same-tree Alpha gate
one through-budget real verified Raw-only observation with zero non-Moomoo full reads and 100 percent remote recovery
zero Gmail, Processed, M3 and Timeline mutations during Beta
final S7AC-002 and linked AC-001, AC-004 and AC-007 protected verdicts
ordering_blocker: The protected Beta workflow can execute only after its code exists on main, but the Owner's no-intermediate-upload rule withholds every GitHub upload until the entire task package and final review are complete. No previous temporary non-production-preflight exception grants authority for a protected real-data upload or dispatch. Therefore the local entrypoint may be made deployment-ready, while PROTECTED_BETA_REAL_RAW_ONLY must remain NOT_RUN until the Owner chooses an upload/execution order and separately provisions every protected prerequisite.
rollback: Revert the local T0702 entrypoint-readiness changes to 955b655fbc5821c5d00c825580bca3dbcd4780cf. No protected Environment, Secret, Gmail message, private repository, GitHub App, Workflow run or remote branch was changed by this run.
stop_conditions: the frozen Stage 0 manifest, inherited product contract or cumulative Stage 6 gate drifts
the workflow can run from a non-main ref, non-GitHub-hosted runner, repeated run attempt, unexpected repository/owner/actor, unexpected commit, non-manual event or unapproved Environment
any Secret outside the exact six Beta names can reach the protected runtime
a Secret can be read before repository, owner, actor, ref, workflow and expected-SHA validation
zero or more than the explicit Beta message budget can produce a PASS observation
a non-deterministically-verified candidate can trigger full RAW fetch or any Raw commit
remote recovery is not one hundred percent for every archived Raw object
Gmail mutation, Parser, M3, Processed, Timeline, schedule, control-repository write or retained plaintext authority enters the Beta path
aggregate evidence can contain a Gmail message, thread, sender, subject, attachment or private repository identifier
real protected data, credentials, external writes, workflow dispatch or intermediate GitHub upload become necessary
the no-intermediate-upload versus GitHub-hosted protected-observation conflict remains unresolved
